sc.political.s: FEC data 2020-2024: EY PAC donated 52% Democratic, 48% Republican candidates.
sc.dei.s: 2023 DEI report: $100M+ global investment; HRC CEI 100 (2022-2024); published inclusion metrics.
sc.environment.s: No EPA enforcement or named pollution events on record; Scope 1+2 disclosure in sustainability reports but no third-party certification cited.
sc.labor.s: No NLRB unfair labor findings or major OSHA citations on public record.
sc.charity.s: EY Foundation reports $500M+ annual giving (2021-2023); published grants, scholarships, disaster relief.
sc.animals.s: Not applicable to professional services firm.
sc.guns.s: Does not manufacture or retail firearms.
sc.privacy.s: No documented FTC privacy enforcement actions; no major HIBP breaches on public record.
sc.execPay.s: Executive compensation not publicly disclosed; CEO-to-median-worker ratio unavailable.
